hero.eyebrow: Smart Food AI serves customers in Chiang Mai
hero.title: Smart Food
hero.lead: An AI-native food service platform operating from a local business in Chiang Mai
hero.support: Chorn Planet applies AI technology to help customers order food through chat, discover menus, receive guidance, and move into order-ready workflows for real food service operations.

visual.alt: Smart Food AI platform serving customers in Chiang Mai

heading.title: Smart Food AI from Chiang Mai local business to an AI food service platform

paragraphs: Smart Food AI serves customers in Chiang Mai by supporting the food service process from chat ordering, menu guidance, order confirmation, payment, kitchen preparation, delivery coordination, and service-ready summaries.

The Smart Food platform supports multiple payment channels, including cash payment, QR Code payment through banking apps, True Money Wallet payment, and support for government co-payment programs such as Half-Half Plus.

Beyond customer ordering, the platform is being developed into an end-to-end food operation system covering kitchen workflows, delivery service, order management, payment processing, payment slip verification, accounting, and other internal systems to support smart food business operations.

image.alt: Smart Food AI serving customers in Chiang Mai through chat food ordering

cards.title: Served from a real local business
cards.text: Started from a Chiang Mai food business context and connected to real customer service needs in the local area.

cards.title: Supports customer food ordering
cards.text: Helps customers discover menus, ask questions, and confirm orders through simple conversation.

cards.title: Developing as an AI-native platform
cards.text: Builds a system foundation that can later connect ordering, payment, delivery, analytics, and commerce.

heading.title: How Smart Food AI serves customers

steps.title: AI Chat Ordering
steps.text: Customers can order through AI-assisted chat by selecting a menu item, asking questions, or confirming an order through a simple conversation.

image.alt: AI chat ordering interface for Smart Food customers

steps.title: Bill Processing
steps.text: The system confirms the order total, receives payment information or a payment slip, and checks the bill before moving the order to the next step.

image.alt: Smart Food bill processing and payment verification

steps.title: Cooking
steps.text: The kitchen team prepares the confirmed order using fresh ingredients, a clear workflow, and consistent food quality standards.

image.alt: Kitchen team preparing a confirmed Smart Food order

steps.title: Delivery
steps.text: The rider picks up the completed order and delivers it to the customer according to the Smart Food service workflow.

image.alt: Smart Food delivery workflow with rider handoff

steps.title: Receiving
steps.text: The customer receives the food through a clear handover process, completing the service journey from ordering to receiving the meal.

image.alt: Customer receiving a completed Smart Food order

heading.title: Why this matters for Chorn Planet
heading.text: The Smart Food AI project development can create and deliver an AI-native platform for real business workflows. By serving customers in Chiang Mai, Chorn Planet uses AI technology to support Smart Food service and build a practical foundation for expanding future business operations.

cards.title: Credibility from service in Chiang Mai
cards.text: The platform serves from a real local food business in Chiang Mai and supports practical customer service operations.
